title: Antruse family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Antruse family''' were one of the original settler families of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. Their members included [[Eppie Belden|Eppie Antruse]], who married [[Orn Belden]] in [[97 BBY]] and later was mother to [[Roviden Belden]].

==Family tree==
 [[Eppie Belden|Eppie Antruse]]--+--[[Orn Belden]]
                       |
                [[Roviden Belden]]

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1st}}
